productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Women F Sleek Trf Grey Sweatshirt
description: Composition Grey hooded sweatshirt made of 95% cotton and 5% cashmere, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, knitted logo and ribbed hem with a drawstring Fit Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately below 40 degrees Do not soak, bleach, dry clean or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print/trims/logo Made of stretchable cotton fabric, this adidas sweatshirt is ideal for all your training needs. The stretchable fabric moves with your body making everything easier, from yoga sessions to gymming. Pair it with trackpants and performance shoes for an extended training session.
